_meta.purpose: Recorded snapshot of the QA-judge, replayed by ReplayJudge so CI is deterministic and network-free. Keyed by ccr_id (matching qa_human_labels.json). Scores are MOSTLY within +/-1 of the human labels, with four deliberate disagreements (ccr-eval-002 alignment & instructor_support; ccr-eval-004 content_accuracy & prerequisites) so the measured agreement is a realistic ~0.83 across the 24 dimension comparisons, not a trivial 1.0.
_meta.note: SYNTHETIC / portfolio demo artifact. NOT a live model output.

content_accuracy.evidence: The MCP spec, server development, and capability negotiation are described accurately and reflect the current standard.

alignment.evidence: Closes the stated MCP gap and aligns with the agent-tool integration outcomes.

prerequisites.evidence: Builds on the existing function-calling lessons; prerequisite chain is reasonable.

consistency.evidence: Terminology and module depth match the rest of the curriculum.

instructor_support.evidence: Ships instructor slides, a graded lab rubric, and two formative quizzes.

student_experience.evidence: Hands-on lab wiring a multi-agent system to MCP servers supports active learning.

content_accuracy.evidence: Hybrid dense+sparse search is described correctly, if briefly.

alignment.evidence: The addition is tangential to the core RAG learning outcomes and feels bolted on.

prerequisites.evidence: Sits cleanly on top of the existing RAG and vector-DB material.

consistency.evidence: Matches the depth and style of the surrounding RAG lesson.

instructor_support.evidence: Two slides and a reading note give instructors enough to deliver it.

student_experience.evidence: A small slide/reading addition with no lab or assessment is a modest experience gain.

content_accuracy.evidence: OpenTelemetry span emission and trace ingestion are described accurately and currently.

alignment.evidence: Directly addresses the production-observability gap and the stated operational outcomes.

prerequisites.evidence: Explicit prerequisite mapping to the deployment module is provided.

consistency.evidence: Consistent terminology and depth with the deployment and evaluation modules.

instructor_support.evidence: Includes an instructor runbook and a reference collector config.

student_experience.evidence: A capstone-integrated tracing lab makes the material concrete and engaging.

content_accuracy.evidence: The dataset-construction lesson is underspecified and some fine-tuning details are vague.

alignment.evidence: Relevant to agentic tasks but positioned as an elective, so alignment to core outcomes is partial.

prerequisites.evidence: Assumes ML training background the prior modules do not fully establish.

consistency.evidence: Heavier theory load than the hands-on style of the rest of the curriculum.

instructor_support.evidence: Instructor guidance is thin and the GPU lab is not provisioned for all cohorts.

student_experience.evidence: GPU-dependent lab and underspecified dataset work risk an uneven learner experience.
